narrative:
Precinct Bethel (precinct in Monroe County) has 193 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.6 percentage points.
